title: INSTANCE_CORRUPTED
description: This project is a modpack using mods such as, no_moon.jar, The Broken Script, wonderland.jar, meant to create a sort of broken version of minecraft/corrupted instance.
body:
INSTANCE_CORRUPTED is a modpack about making minecraft feel, corrupted, and non-safe, Only those with the soul of a block of bedrock, This modpack will and can ban you from your world, crash your game, but it cannot damage your computer.

DO NOT READ UNLESS YOU WANT SPOILERS
# MODS USED
https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map
https://modrinth.com/mod/wonderland-jar
https://modrinth.com/mod/veinminer
https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script-patches
https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script

https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus
https://modrinth.com/shaderpack/nostalgia-shader
https://modrinth.com/mod/no_moon.jar
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days-alpha
https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib
https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core
